3017390.name: Last Story: Dungeon
3017390.description: Get ready for an exhilarating adventure in a mysterious dungeon, where every jump and obstacle will test your skills and determination. Immerse yourself in this new world that will challenge your limits as you uncover the secrets behind Drystan and his parents' disappearance. With stunning visuals and an engaging soundtrack, you'll be transported into an intense and challenging experience filled with mysteries and surprising discoveries. Prepare to test your abilities to the fullest in this unforgettable journey.
3017390.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
